description: Core knowledge — read-only for Claude. Updated only via admin promotion.

global_rules.rule: Volume confirmation: vol_x > 1.5 strongly confirms a BUY signal. vol_x 0.5–1.2 is acceptable for entries — normal consolidation volume. Only treat vol_x < 0.3 as a warning (reduce confidence by 10–15%), NOT as a veto. Low-volume moves in uptrends are valid — do not block BUY solely because vol_x < 1.2.

RSI overbought handling is regime-dependent: In RANGING or BEAR_TREND, avoid BUY when RSI > 74 (mean-reversion risk). In BULL_TREND, RSI 70–82 is normal momentum — reduce confidence by 10% but do NOT veto BUY. Only hard-veto in BULL_TREND when RSI > 82.
RSI < 28 + MACD bullish cross is one of the strongest entry combinations
bb_pct < 0.1 (price near lower BB) with rising volume = high-probability reversal

interval_notes.1h: Noisy — many false signals; require higher confidence thresholds
interval_notes.4h: Best balance of signal quality and trade frequency for most USDC pairs
interval_notes.1d: Very reliable patterns but few trades per month
